'''Elena Shelvay''' was an [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] [[operative]] and sister of [[Corwin Shelvay/Legends|Corwin Shelvay]].

==Biography==
After the murder of the [[Shelvay family]] at the hands of [[High Inquisitor]] [[Antinnis Tremayne]], Elena was kidnapped and re-educated by the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]. As a result of her [[Re-Education/Legends|re-education]] she was brainwashed to believe her brother was to blame for her family's murder due to his [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] teaching. She became emotionally unstable as a result, but regardless of this, she was a competent and dedicated ISB agent. Her loyalty to the Empire saw her rapid ascension through the Imperial hierarchy, and she eventually became the aide of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Abran Balfour/Legends|Abran Balfour]].<ref name="GG9" />
